comment: First-slice placeholder mappings (npcId 1 + 78) to be re-authored. 78 is next to the bedroom spawn for proof.

pages: Bosch! Wake up. Your phone minted something at 4am, and it is signed with your name.
The payload just says 'Swag is eternal.' You didn't write that. Somebody beat you to being you.
